reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros siempre. Lugar amplio para maniobrar y evitar conflictos.

Excellent service from the beach attendants, as always. Spacious area for maneuvering and avoiding conflicts.

reviews.comment:
Busca inflar una cubierta del auto y no tenían servicio. No lo pude encontrar en ninguna estación de servicio de Miramar

I was looking to inflate a car tire, but they didn't have any service. I couldn't find it at any gas station in Miramar.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para cargar combustible fuera de mar del plata, para evitar colas, destaco la atención del personal muy atentos y amables.

Excellent place to refuel outside of Mar del Plata, to avoid queues. I highlight the attention of the staff, very attentive and friendly.
